message:
fix: ensure agent and workspace FK rows exist within transaction snapshot

Bug #167: When bulk-ingesting conversations, agent_id and workspace_id
values are resolved via ensure_agent/ensure_workspace outside the batch
transaction.  Under frankensqlite, those autocommit writes may not be
visible inside the transaction's WAL snapshot, causing FK constraint
violations during INSERT.

This adds two in-transaction guard functions:
- ensure_agents_in_tx: checks each unique agent_id within the tx and
  creates a stub row (INSERT OR IGNORE) if missing, using the
  conversation's agent_slug
- ensure_workspaces_in_tx: same pattern for workspace_id, using the
  conversation's workspace path

Both run at the start of the batch transaction before any conversation
inserts, ensuring FK targets exist in the tx snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
